response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive senior-level experience in software development, leadership, and architecture across diverse domains, including IT consulting, open-source projects, and high-performance systems. His fluency in English and basic German align with the job requirements, though German proficiency could be further developed. His technical breadth (Python, Linux, UML) is strong, but leadership and strategic oversight experience is less explicitly highlighted in the resume.
strengths: Proven track record in senior software development and architectural design across multiple industries and technologies (Node.js, DLang, TypeScript, etc.)
Deep expertise in open-source technologies and project leadership, as evidenced by GISCollective and other initiatives
Strong problem-solving skills, mentorship, and community engagement (workshops, talks, open-source contributions)
concerns: Limited explicit mention of UML expertise or complex IT security/compliance experience in the resume
German language proficiency is only at a basic level, though English is fluent
No direct experience in IT consulting leadership or client-facing strategic advisory roles mentioned
